name: Aurora Espresso Blend
description: A smooth espresso roast with dark chocolate body, citrus finish, and enough structure for milk drinks or straight shots.

name: Sunrise Filter Roast
description: Bright washed coffee with notes of stone fruit, caramel, and jasmine. Built for pour-over and batch brew.

name: Midnight Decaf
description: Comforting Swiss-water decaf with nougat sweetness and a syrupy texture that still tastes like real coffee.

name: Matcha Cloud Ceremonial
description: Stone-milled ceremonial grade matcha with creamy texture, sweet grass aroma, and a clean umami finish.

name: Oolong Mist
description: A fragrant high-mountain oolong with honeyed florals and a buttery finish for slow afternoons.

name: Precision Brew Scale
description: USB-C rechargeable brew scale with timer, fast response, and gram-level accuracy for dialed cups.

name: Thermal Travel Mug
description: Double-wall stainless mug that keeps drinks hot for hours with a leak-resistant twist lid.

name: Weekend Brew Gift Set
description: A ready-to-gift box with two coffees, a dripper, filters, and recipe cards for an easy home setup.
